data.caption:
Come to Gary’s this 5th of July for tons of fun, food, and Fireworks!! 🎇🎆

 #funatgarys #supportlocal #summerfun #fireworks

🎆🇺🇸 The countdown is ON! 🇺🇸🎆

Join us for our 5th Annual Fireworks Celebration at Gary’s Family Resort on Sunday, July 5th! 🎇

🕘 Fireworks begin at 9:45 PM — but come early for an evening packed with fun!

🎶 Live Music
🌽 Corn Hole
⛳ 27 Holes of Mini Golf
🪂 Zip Lining (until sundown)
🍔 Grab dinner at the Jiffy Pup
🍿 Snack Stand featuring cotton candy, hot dogs, freshly popped movie theater popcorn, and more!

🚗 Please arrive early for parking and to enjoy all the entertainment before fireworks light up the sky!

🎉 GIVEAWAY TIME! 🎉
Share this post and you’ll be entered into a drawing to win ONE FREE Jiffy Pup combo OR ONE FREE specialty ice cream (which includes Banana Splits, Sundaes, Milkshakes, etc)! 🍔🍌🍨

🏆 The winner can redeem their prize anytime during the remainder of the 2026 season!

Whether you’re staying with us or just stopping by for the evening, everyone is welcome! Bring your family, your friends, and your lawn chairs—we can’t wait to celebrate with you! ❤️🤍💙

For more information, visit https://garysfamilyresort.com

📣 Share this post, tag your friends, and help us make our 5th Annual Fireworks Celebration our biggest one yet!

#funatgarys#Fireworks#FamilyFun #SummerNights #SupportLocal

There’s no wrong way to mini golf at Gary’s Family Resort! ⛳️

#funatgarys #fyp #foryoupage #smallbusiness #viral
